the view that ends of justice would be served if the appellants are 
sentenced to undergo simple imprisonment for one month.
Accordingly, we confirm the conviction and modify the sentence from 
simple imprisonment for six months to simple imprisonment for one 
month. It is ordered accordingly.
15 
(1953) 1 SCC 726
122 
Supreme Court Reports
The appellants shall surrender before the Registrar of the High 
Court of Madras within 15 days from today to undergo the sentence. 
Registrar (Judicial) of this Court is directed to communicate this order 
to the concerned High Court for compliance.
Result of the case: Appeals dismissed.
